programmes.show_description: Three Times A Keloid. Robert has a small keloid on his ear and a large, snakelike keloid on the back of his head that has been removed and returned three times. S4, Ep8
Scarry Scarry Night. Robert is back to see if Dr. Lee and Dr. Umar can remove his recurring head keloid for good. Justice has small lesions all over her body that get inflamed. S4, Ep9
Lacey's Story. Lacey has ballooned to over 600 lbs. She must now rally her divorced parents around her and find a way to modulate her moods that won't include binge-eating. S7, Ep6

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Bridal Besties Show. Runway choreographer Vicky brings her fashion friends to help her. Habiba's pals may have picked a fab frock, but they forgot to check the price tag! S3, Ep27

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Dare To Bare Show. Mature bride Karli falls for a dress with a sexy side split, but her teenage daughter disapproves. Georgina doesn't want to look too sexy on her big day. S3, Ep28

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress Lancashire
programmes.show_description: The Confidence To Say Yes. Jilly is riding to her wedding on a tractor, so her dress must be practical and elegant. And, indecisive Faye fears she'll make the wrong choice again. S1, Ep6
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Cowboy Aerobics. Sheldon campaigns to become Dr. Linkletter's lab assistant. Georgie enlists the drama teacher, to help with a surprising business venture. S4, Ep10
A Pager, A Club. Dr. Linkletter pushes Sheldon to make friends with his fellow students, and Georgie gets a pager. S4, Ep11
A Box Of Treasure. Sheldon, Dr. Linkletter and Meemaw team up on a science experiment. Mary is jealous that Pastor Jeff and Brenda are spending so much time together. S4, Ep12
The Geezer Bus And A New Model. Sheldon refuses to ride in a car after getting into an accident with Meemaw. Meemaw is forced to take the church shuttle. S4, Ep13
Mitch's Son. When the IRS accuses Sheldon of making a mistake, he stops at nothing to prove them wrong. Meanwhile, Dale is forced to get a colonoscopy. S4, Ep14
A Virus, Heartbreak. Sheldon faces consequences after installing a pirated computer game. Mary and Meemaw take Brenda out for Girls Night, and George watches Billy. S4, Ep15
A Second Prodigy. Sheldon is at odds with Paige once again when she considers enrolling at East Texas Tech. Mary seeks the advice of June when looking for a change. S4, Ep16
A Black Hole. The Coopers discuss the possibilities of black holes and alternate universes when Dr. Sturgis comes over for dinner. S4, Ep17
The Hot Tub Contamination. Sheldon accuses Amy of not following the bathroom schedule. Meanwhile, Howard and Bernadette's staycation is interrupted by hot tub interlopers. S10, Ep5
The Fetal Kick Catalyst. Feeling his baby kick sends Howard on a baby-items buying binge with Raj, Sheldon and Amy host a brunch, and Penny is invited to a sci-fi convention. S10, Ep6
The Veracity Elasticity. Amy fibs about repairs being made to her apartment. Later, they present an episode of 'Fun with Flags' in Penny's apartment. S10, Ep7
The Brain Bowl Incubation. A successful gene experiment leaves Sheldon excited to procreate with Amy. Raj is reluctant to reveal what his new woman does for a living. S10, Ep8
The Geology Elevation. A coworker's MacArthur Genius fellowship award leaves Sheldon stone cold jealous. Howard finds a remote-control Stephen Hawking action figure. S10, Ep9
Property Division Collision. A divide develops between Sheldon and Leonard when divvying up their shared belongings. Raj and Stuart battle to provide Bernadette the most help. S10, Ep10
The Birthday Synchronicity. While Sheldon and Amy celebrate Amy's birthday, Howard and Bernadette welcome their new Baby Wolowitz. S10, Ep11
The Holiday Summation. Sheldon and Amy visit Leonard and Penny for the first time since the holidays and share details about their terrible trip to Texas. S10, Ep12
The Romance Recalibration. After a disagreement, Penny takes off for a spa weekend, and Sheldon plays peacemaker. Howard and Raj battle a noisy floor in the baby's room. S10, Ep13
Emotion Detection Automation. Sheldon tests an MIT invention, Leonard has trouble when Penny announces her brother's visit, and Raj seeks advice from old girlfriends. S10, Ep14
The Locomotion Reverberation. Leonard and Howard engineer a distraction for Sheldon to keep him from hindering progress on the guidance-system project. S10, Ep15
The Allowance Evaporation. Amy is incensed when she learns Sheldon has shared intimate relationship information, and Raj's father stops sending financial support. S10, Ep16
The Comic-Con Conundrum. Raj finds himself in a cash crunch and turns to Sheldon to help him. Meanwhile, Penny considers crashing the guys' annual Comic-Con getaway. S10, Ep17
Escape Hatch Identification. Leonard and Penny offer Sheldon's old room to Raj after he moves out of his apartment. S10, Ep18
The Collaboration Fluctuation. Raj moves in with Leonard and Penny, and a period of adjustment begins, while usually self-centred Sheldon shows surprising interest in Amy's work. S10, Ep19
The Recollection Dissipation. Sheldon is pushing himself with too many collaborations. Bernadette's maternity leave is running out, and she must face going back to work. S10, Ep20
The Separation Agitation. Leaving the baby in daycare proves to be tough for Bernadette, and geologist Bert digs up a girlfriend, but some colleagues think she's a gold digger. S10, Ep21
The Cognition Regeneration. Leonard isn't thrilled when Penny considers taking a new job offered by her ex-boyfriend, Zack. S10, Ep22
The Gyroscopic Collapse. Leonard, Sheldon and Wolowitz celebrate the completion of their top-secret military project, until an unpleasant surprise leaves their heads spinning. S10, Ep23
The Long Distance Dissonance. Sheldon's former admirer, Dr. Ramona Nowitzki, turns up while Amy is visiting Princeton, and the gang is extremely concerned. S10, Ep24
The Comet Polarization. Sheldon's comic book store experience changes when Neil Gaiman puts Stuart's store on the map. And Raj takes credit for Penny's astronomical discovery. S11, Ep21
The Monetary Insufficiency. Sheldon goes to Vegas to win money for science. Penny and Bernadette take Amy wedding dress shopping, but her choice entangles them in a web of lies. S11, Ep22
Best friends and comedians Roisin Conaty and Sara Pascoe are visiting locations with the most hilarious, baffling and terribly bad reviews.
When a group of mercenaries steal a hi-tech weapon that poses a global threat, Xander Cage leads a team of adrenaline junkies on a recovery mission.
The Incredible Shrinking Lipoma. Gerald returns to see Dr. Lee and a hand specialist about a huge, intrusive bump on his finger. Vinnie has an embarrassing birthmark on his neck. S2, Ep8
My Brainlike Bump. Debra has a large, brainlike growth on the side of her head that feels like a sponge, has crevices and emits an odour. Cowboy Dusten has painful lump on his knee. S4, Ep10
Brandon's Story. Brandon is a talented musician and singer but his addiction to food has left him incapacitated, and he risks losing his girlfriend and his career dreams. S7, Ep7

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Pursuit Of Perfection Show. Amy has seen the dress of her dreams - but can she boost her budget? Aisling returns for a fitting, but worries that gorgeous details have been lost. S3, Ep31

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Wed To The Dress Show. Bride Grace has fallen for a gown that exceeds her budget and is only available in America. Can David find her another, cheaper dream dress? S3, Ep32
Here Comes The Bride Again...And Again. Keasha bonds with cancer survivor, Jennifer while they search for a dress. Plus, a bad-tempered bride takes her frustrations out on Vera. S2, Ep1
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
The Wild And Woolly World. Missy's first heartbreak triggers a series of events that lead the Cooper family to the brink. S4, Ep18
One Bad Night. Sheldon and Missy both run away from home, while Mary gets some upsetting news about her husband, George. S5, Ep1
Snoopin' Around. Sheldon encourages Missy to question the Bible. Meemaw determines to catch George Sr. in a lie, and Mary helps Pastor Jeff search for a youth pastor. S5, Ep2
Potential Energy And Hooch. While Sheldon tries to convince Dr. Sturgis to return to the university, Georgie upsets the family when he makes a life-changing decision. S5, Ep3
Pish Posh And A Secret Room. While Meemaw opens a secret gambling room, Sheldon, Missy and Georgie adapt to new living arrangements. S5, Ep4
Stuffed Animals. While Mary's away, George finds himself giving advice on Missy's love life. And Georgie has a solution for Meemaw's business woes. S5, Ep5
The Proposal Proposal. What did she say? Amy answers Sheldon's marriage proposal. Meanwhile, Howard and Bernadette struggle with some unexpected news. S11, Ep1
The Retraction Reaction. Leonard's job is at stake when he gives an embarrassing radio interview which angers the university and the entire physics community. S11, Ep2
The Relaxation Integration. Amy tries to convince Sheldon that he has a more laid-back side, meanwhile, Raj and Stuart compete to win the heart of Bernadette's new co-worker. S11, Ep3
The Explosion Implosion. Wolowitz and Sheldon bond over their relationships with their disappointing fathers. And Leonard's mum finds a new best friend in Penny. S11, Ep4
Collaboration Contamination. Sheldon and Raj confide in Bernadette when they can't handle Amy and Howard working together. Penny and Leonard learn new ways to deal with Sheldon. S11, Ep5
The Proton Regeneration. Sheldon goes head-to-head with Wil Wheaton. Penny takes care of Halley when Bernadette and Howard are both on bed rest. S11, Ep6
The Geology Methodology. Sheldon and Bert collaborate on a research project, while Penny and Bernadette coach Koothrappali on how to navigate his relationship with Ruchi. S11, Ep7
The Tesla Recoil. Leonard and Howard learn Sheldon went to work with the military. Bernadette suspects Ruchi is trying to steal her job. S11, Ep8
The Bitcoin Entanglement. The guys cut Sheldon out of a potentially valuable Bitcoin investment. Also, an old video reveals a secret about Leonard and Penny's relationship. S11, Ep9
The Confidence Erosion. Sheldon and Amy try to eliminate stress from wedding planning using maths. Raj realises his best friend is actually hurting his confidence. S11, Ep10
The Celebration Reverberation. Sheldon and Howard plan birthday celebrations for Amy and Halley. Leonard spirals out about his lack of accomplishments. S11, Ep11
The Matrimonial Metric. Sheldon and Amy subject their friends to a series of experiments to choose the best man and maid of honour. And Penny reveals her true feelings. S11, Ep12
The Solo Oscillation. Amy and Leonard bond during a series of experiments. Bert replaces Howard in Footprints on the Moon, and Sheldon finds Penny a source of inspiration. S11, Ep13
The Separation Triangulation. Raj learns the woman he's dating has a very upset husband. Sheldon rents his old room for a quiet place to work. S11, Ep14
The Novelization Correlation. Wil Wheaton offers Amy a role on the new 'Professor Proton Show,' and Penny thinks the female protagonist in Leonard's novel is based on her. S11, Ep15
The Neonatal Nomenclature. All Bernadette's friends try different tactics to get labour started. Amy accidentally reveals she's already chosen their son's name. S11, Ep16
The Athenaeum Allocation. Leonard tries to secure the perfect wedding venue for Sheldon and Amy. Bernadette and Howard have a hard time deciding who should go back to work. S11, Ep17
The Gates Excitation. Bill Gates' company wants to partner with Penny's pharmaceutical company. Leonard, Raj and Howard do everything in their power to meet him. S11, Ep18
The Tenant Disassociation. Leonard decides to run against Sheldon for president of the tenants' association. Bernadette encourages Howard and Raj to find the owner of a drone. S11, Ep19
The Reclusive Potential. A reclusive scientist invites Sheldon to his remote cabin. Penny and Bernadette improvise after Amy doesn't like the bachelorette they planned. S11, Ep20
A Tie Breaker & A Huge Mistake. Tensions rise when new co-owners Georgie and Ruben realise they can't agree on anything. Jim struggles to find his purpose now that he's retired. S2, Ep1
Fan Mail. Georgie's upset when Mandy's new role as weekend weather girl gets her more attention from the men in town, and Connor turns to Jim for help. S2, Ep2
Istanbul. Leech therapy, brutal massages and shaving a grown man are all on the menu for comedians Roisin Conaty and Sara Pascoe's Istanbul odyssey. S1, Ep1
The Comet Polarization. Sheldon's comic book store experience changes when Neil Gaiman puts Stuart's store on the map. And Raj takes credit for Penny's astronomical discovery. S11, Ep21
The Monetary Insufficiency. Sheldon goes to Vegas to win money for science. Penny and Bernadette take Amy wedding dress shopping, but her choice entangles them in a web of lies. S11, Ep22
An American Tail. The large bump at the base of Taylor's spine is more dangerous than she realizes. John has an embarrassing hip lump, and Noelle wants her stretched ears repaired. S1, Ep7
